# example_todo_api — Requirements

<!-- generated by canary-lab verified-coverage; edit source docs and regenerate -->

## R1 — Create a todo

A POST /todos with a title creates a todo, returns its generated id, and marks it done:false. A request with no title is rejected (negative path).

_Paths: happy, sad_

## R2 — List todos

GET /todos returns every todo that has been created, in creation order.

_Paths: happy_

## R3 — Delete a todo

DELETE /todos/:id removes the todo so it no longer appears in the list. Removal should ultimately be confirmable from the user-facing surface (a browser viewing the list), not only from the API response.

_Paths: happy_

## R4 — Update a todo

PATCH /todos/:id changes a todo's title or done state and returns the updated todo. Not yet implemented or tested.

_Paths: happy_
